branch.branch_summary: Open the next implementation task only after a runtime-backed direction review turns v7.8 Mission Control coverage and forecast projection into a bounded task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v7.7 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v7.8 Mission Control Coverage Forecast Projection: show requirement coverage, forecast, blockers, adoption proof, and evidence completeness from canonical runtime artifacts without making the viewer a source of truth.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Open the next implementation task only after a runtime-backed direction review turns v7.8 Mission Control coverage and forecast projection into a bounded task.
